title: What I think about The Course in Miracles

transcript.text: Hello, I figured I should give a book review on The Course of Miracles because it's a cult

My life.
I got it 10 years ago.
My Reiki teacher gave it to me and I gave him the grantee book, he was all into it.
I was supposed to read it in one year.
It was written by Jesus Christ, channeled through a lady.
And it says one thing over and over and over again, kind of with no rhyme or reason to it,
It says it over and over again, kind of like the Koran, like a fireside chat thing, it basically
Says that you shouldn't make favorites, don't be friends with somebody just because they're
Similar to you.
You should make friends with somebody because they're a person and that was a pretty cool
Philosophy.
Kind of brought me, made me remember this one incident when Jesus is talking atop the
Mount and his family comes and somebody goes, hey Jesus, your family's here finally to watch
You speak after they've been ignoring him.
And he goes, what family?
I don't have a family.
I don't have a family.
The human race is my family.
And I think that's pretty much the gist of what Jesus came down to earth to teach, is
That your family is your human family and if you hang out with people just because they're
Similar to you and they believe the same thing as you, then all that does is create
